creator: acm@FreeBSD.org
text: Hello, I have updated zaproxy to 2.16.0 (https://cgit.freebsd.org/ports/commit/?id=833cabce4976a22a0367d2246c417f7499e1ecc1). It includes a pkg-message file with some entries about selenium, web browsers configuration and py-zaproxy.  Now, Selenium and web browsers like chrome or firefox would be run without issues.
